overview.description: The RiverNorth Active Income ETF (CEFZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation and income by tactically allocating investments in various asset classes from around the world.  The actively managed fund-of-funds uses research and analysis to invest in closed-end funds, ETFs, individual equity, and fixed income securities CEFZ was launched on Dec 27, 2006 and is issued by Truemark Group.
